front: What is the concept of bioequivalence for peptide biosimilars?
back: Biosimilar peptides must demonstrate: 1) Similarity to reference product (structure, function), 2) No clinically meaningful differences in efficacy/safety, 3) No increased immunogenicity. Steps: analytical similarity → functional assays → PK/PD equivalence → clinical confirmation. Key: higher similarity threshold than small-molecule generics.
